CompanyBranding.title: Company Branding
CompanyBranding.description: Stores the company's branding information for letterheads and general UI.

company_name.description: The full name of the company.

letterhead_text.description: Additional text to display on the letterhead.

letterhead_image_url.description: URL to the company's full letterhead image.

footer_image_url.description: URL to the company's footer image.

watermark_image_url.description: URL to a watermark image for printable documents.

system_background_url.description: URL for the background image of the system pages.

financial_statement_notes.description: The full text content for the notes to the financial statements.

work_hours.description: Defines the company's working hours, holidays, and appointment settings.

general.description: General working hours for meeting rooms and other departments.

appointment_buffer_time.description: Break time in minutes between appointments.

architectural.description: Specific working hours for the architectural department.

appointment_buffer_time.description: Break time in minutes between appointments.

ramadan.description: Defines special working hours for the month of Ramadan.

start_date.description: Start date of Ramadan for the current year.

end_date.description: End date of Ramadan for the current year.

payment_methods.description: Configurable payment methods and their associated fees.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company profile in a multi-company setup.

parentCompanyId.description: The ID of the parent company, if this is a subsidiary.

activityType.description: The business activity type of the company.

CompanyActivityType.title: Company Activity Type
CompanyActivityType.description: Defines a type of business activity a company can have.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's login account in the system.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Authentication.

username.description: The user's unique username for login.

passwordHash.description: The securely hashed password for the user. Hashing should be done server-side.

employeeId.description: A reference to the corresponding document ID in the 'employees' collection.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

isActive.description: Whether the user's account is active and can log in.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

activatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was last activated.

createdBy.description: The user ID of the admin who created this account.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client of the consultancy.

fileId.description: The client's file ID, in the format 'sequence/year' (e.g., '1/2024').

fileNumber.description: The sequential part of the client's file ID for a given year.

fileYear.description: The year of the client's file ID.

nameAr.description: The full name of the client in Arabic.

nameEn.description: The full name of the client in English.

plotNumber.description: The client's plot number for contracts.

status.description: The current status of the client's file.

transactionCounter.description: A counter for the number of transactions created for this client, used to generate sequential transaction numbers.

assignedEngineer.description: The ID of the engineer assigned to this client.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the client was created.

ClientTransaction.title: Client Transaction
ClientTransaction.description: Represents an internal service or transaction for a client, like a design submission.

transactionNumber.description: A unique, human-readable, sequential transaction number for the client (e.g., CL123-TX01).

clientId.description: The ID of the client this transaction belongs to.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction, e.g., 'Municipality Design', 'Electricity Design'.

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

departmentId.description: The ID of the primary department for this transaction.

transactionTypeId.description: The ID of the transaction type.

status.description: The current status of the transaction.

assignedEngineerId.description: The ID of the primary engineer assigned to this transaction.

stages.description: The lifecycle stages of the transaction.

contract.description: Stores the customized contract clauses and total amount for this specific transaction.

percentage.description: The original percentage value if the financial type was 'percentage'.

boqItemCount.description: A summary field holding the total number of items in the BOQ subcollection.

boqTotalValue.description: A summary field holding the total planned value of the BOQ subcollection.

TransactionAssignment.title: Transaction Assignment
TransactionAssignment.description: Represents an assignment or forwarding of a transaction to a specific department and engineer.

transactionId.description: The ID of the parent ClientTransaction.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the assignment.

TransactionTimelineEvent.title: Transaction Timeline Event
TransactionTimelineEvent.description: Represents a single event (comment or log) in a transaction's history.

content.description: The content of the comment or the description of the log.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the event.

userName.description: The name of the user who created the event.

userAvatar.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

TransactionStage.title: Transaction Stage
TransactionStage.description: Tracks the progress of a single stage within a client transaction's lifecycle. It is linked to a reference WorkStage via stageId.

stageId.description: The ID of the reference WorkStage document from the department's workStages subcollection.

name.description: Name of the stage, stored for convenience. The name in the reference data is the source of truth.

order.description: The display and logical order of the stage, copied from the template.

status.description: The current status of the stage.

allowedRoles.description: The job titles responsible for this stage, copied from the WorkStage template.

stageType.description: 'sequential' for main workflow steps, 'parallel' for service stages like modifications that can run alongside.

nextStageIds.description: A list of possible next stage IDs to transition to from this stage.

allowedDuringStages.description: For parallel stages only. A list of sequential stage IDs during which this parallel stage can be initiated.

trackingType.description: The tracking type of the stage, copied from the template.

expectedDurationDays.description: The expected duration in days for this stage (if trackingType is 'duration').

maxOccurrences.description: The maximum number of times this stage can occur (if trackingType is 'occurrence').

allowManualCompletion.description: If true, allows manually completing an 'occurrence' stage before reaching its max count.

modificationCount.description: How many times a modification has been recorded for this stage.

expectedEndDate.description: The expected completion date for countdowns.

completedCount.description: How many times this stage has been completed (if trackingType is 'occurrence').

Counter.title: Counter
Counter.description: Stores sequential counters for various entities.

counts.description: A map of keys (e.g., years) to their current count.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an employee in the company.

employeeNumber.description: The unique identifying number for the employee.

workStartTime.description: The official start time for the employee's shift (e.g., '08:00').

workEndTime.description: The official end time for the employee's shift (e.g., '17:00').

noticeStartDate.description: Date when resignation/termination notice was given.

contractPercentage.description: The percentage of contract value for commission-based employees.

pieceRateMode.description: For piece-rate contracts, defines if it's a fixed salary with a target, or purely per piece.

targetDescription.description: For salary-with-target contracts, this defines the numerical monthly/weekly target.

pieceRate.description: The price per piece for 'per_piece' contract types.

LeaveRequest.title: Leave Request
LeaveRequest.description: Represents a leave request submitted by an employee.

employeeId.description: ID of the employee requesting leave.

workingDays.description: Total number of calculated working days.

notes.description: Reason or notes for the leave.

attachmentUrl.description: URL to a medical report or other document.

status.description: The current status of the leave request.

approvedBy.description: UID of the user who approved/rejected the request.

rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejecting the leave request.

isBackFromLeave.description: Indicates if the employee has returned from this specific leave.

actualReturnDate.description: The actual date the employee returned to work.

passportReceived.description: Indicates if the employee's passport has been received for the leave.

isSalaryPaid.description: Indicates if the salary for this leave has been processed.

PermissionRequest.title: Permission Request
PermissionRequest.description: Represents a permission request from an employee for late arrival or early departure.

employeeId.description: ID of the employee requesting permission.

date.description: The date for which the permission is requested.

status.description: The current status of the request.

approvedBy.description: UID of the user who approved/rejected the request.

AuditLog.title: Audit Log
AuditLog.description: Records changes made to employee data for historical tracking.

field.description: The name of the field that was changed.

oldValue.description: The value of the field before the change.

newValue.description: The value of the field after the change.

effectiveDate.description: The date when this change becomes effective.

changedBy.description: The ID of the user who made the change.

MonthlyAttendance.title: Monthly Attendance
MonthlyAttendance.description: An employee's attendance records and summary for a specific month.

Payslip.title: Payslip
Payslip.description: An employee's payslip for a specific month.

attendanceId.description: Reference to the attendance document ID.

type.description: The type of payslip, either a regular monthly salary or a leave salary payout.

leaveRequestId.description: If type is 'Leave', this links to the LeaveRequest document.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user about an event in the system.

userId.description: The ID of the user to whom the notification is sent.

title.description: A short, bolded title for the notification.

body.description: The main content of the notification message.

link.description: The URL the user will be redirected to upon clicking the notification.

isRead.description: Whether the user has read the notification.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a department in the company.

activityTypes.description: The business activities this department belongs to.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Represents a job title within a department.

Governorate.title: Governorate
Governorate.description: Represents a governorate in the country.

Area.title: Area
Area.description: Represents an area within a governorate.

TransactionType.title: Transaction Type
TransactionType.description: Represents a type of internal client transaction and links it to the departments involved.

name.description: The name of the transaction type (e.g., 'Municipality Design').

activityType.description: The business activity this transaction type belongs to.

departmentIds.description: A list of department IDs involved in this transaction type.

order.description: The display and logical order of the type.

WorkStage.title: Work Stage
WorkStage.description: Represents a standard work stage that can be associated with a department. Defines a step in a workflow.

name.description: The name of the work stage.

order.description: The display and logical order of the stage.

stageType.description: 'sequential' for main workflow steps, 'parallel' for service stages like modifications that can run alongside.

allowedRoles.description: A list of job titles responsible for this stage.

nextStageIds.description: A list of possible next stage IDs to transition to from this stage.

allowedDuringStages.description: For parallel stages only. A list of sequential stage IDs during which this parallel stage can be initiated.

trackingType.description: How to track progress: by time, occurrences, or as a single event.

enableModificationTracking.description: If true, allows a modification counter to be incremented for this stage.

expectedDurationDays.description: The expected duration in days for this stage (if trackingType is 'duration').

maxOccurrences.description: The maximum number of times this stage can occur (if trackingType is 'occurrence').

allowManualCompletion.description: If true, allows manually completing an 'occurrence' stage before reaching its max count.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents a scheduled meeting or visit.

clientId.description: The ID of the client for this appointment. Can be null for a new prospect.

clientName.description: The name of the client, especially if not yet a registered client.

clientMobile.description: The mobile number of the client, especially if not yet a registered client.

engineerId.description: The ID of the employee attending the appointment.

meetingRoom.description: The name of the meeting room, if applicable (for non-architectural appointments).

department.description: The department associated with the appointment, used for color-coding.

title.description: The purpose or title of the appointment.

type.description: Distinguishes between architectural appointments and room bookings.

status.description: The current status of the appointment, especially for cancellation tracking.

appointmentDate.description: The start date and time of the appointment.

endDate.description: The end date and time of the appointment.

transactionId.description: The ID of the client transaction this appointment is related to.

workStageUpdated.description: Indicates if the work stage has been updated for this visit.

workStageProgressId.description: Reference to the document in work_stages_progress.

visitCount.description: The sequential visit number for this client's architectural appointments.

color.description: Hex color code for calendar display based on visit status.

WorkStageProgress.title: Work Stage Progress
WorkStageProgress.description: Logs the selection of a work stage for a specific architectural visit.

transactionId.description: The ID of the client transaction this visit is related to.

visitId.description: The ID of the architectural visit document.

stageId.description: The ID of the selected work stage.

stageName.description: The name of the selected work stage.

selectedBy.description: The ID of the employee who updated the stage.

Contract.title: Contract
Contract.description: Represents a fully dynamic, user-generated contract.

companySnapshot.description: A snapshot of company data at time of creation.

ContractTemplate.title: Contract Template
ContractTemplate.description: A reusable template for generating contracts.

templateType.description: The type of the contract, e.g., Consulting or Execution.

Account.title: Account
Account.description: An account in the Chart of Accounts.

level.description: The hierarchy level of the account.

JournalEntryLine.title: Journal Entry Line
JournalEntryLine.description: A single line in a journal entry, representing a debit or credit to an account.

accountId.description: The ID of the account from the chart of accounts.

clientId.description: The ID of the client related to this line.

transactionId.description: The ID of the client transaction related to this line.

auto_profit_center.description: Auto-tagged client/project ID for profit analysis.

auto_resource_id.description: Auto-tagged employee ID for resource analysis.

auto_dept_id.description: Auto-tagged department ID for departmental analysis.

JournalEntry.title: Journal Entry
JournalEntry.description: Represents a general journal entry with multiple debit/credit lines.

entryNumber.description: A sequential number for the journal entry (e.g., JV-2024-0001).

date.description: The date of the journal entry.

narration.description: A general description or narration for the entry.

linkedReceiptId.description: The ID of the cash receipt that triggered this entry, if any.

totalDebit.description: The total of all debit lines, for validation.

totalCredit.description: The total of all credit lines, for validation.

status.description: The status of the journal entry.

reconciliationStatus.description: The bank reconciliation status of the entry.

clientId.description: The ID of the client related to this entry.

transactionId.description: The ID of the client transaction related to this entry.

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the entry.

PaymentVoucher.title: Payment Voucher
PaymentVoucher.description: Represents a payment voucher for disbursing funds.

employeeId.description: Link to employee if payeeType is employee, for residency renewal etc.

renewalExpiryDate.description: New expiry date if this is for residency renewal.

reference.description: e.g., Cheque number or transfer reference

clientId.description: Client ID if this payment is for a project

transactionId.description: Transaction ID if this payment is for a project

paymentMethod.description: The name of the payment method used, from settings.

bankFeeAmount.description: The calculated bank fee for this transaction, if any.

netAmount.description: The net amount received after deducting bank fees (amount - bankFeeAmount).

journalEntryId.description: The ID of the journal entry automatically created for this receipt.

Quotation.title: Quotation
Quotation.description: Represents a price quotation provided to a client.

departmentId.description: The ID of the department this quotation is for.

transactionTypeId.description: The ID of the transaction type this quotation is for.

condition.description: The condition for this item to be due, often linked to a work stage.

transactionId.description: The ID of the transaction this quotation was converted to.

PurchaseOrder.title: Purchase Order
PurchaseOrder.description: Represents a purchase order for materials or services.

ResidencyRenewal.title: Residency Renewal
ResidencyRenewal.description: Tracks the financial transaction for an employee's residency renewal.

Warehouse.title: Warehouse
Warehouse.description: Represents a storage location for inventory.

parentCategoryId.description: The ID of the parent category, null for root categories.

itemType.description: 'product' for physical goods (storable or consumable), 'service' for non-physical items.

inventoryTracked.description: If true, the quantity of this product will be tracked (storable). If false, it's a consumable.

expiryTracked.description: If true, this item requires expiry date tracking.

SupplierItem.title: Supplier Item
SupplierItem.description: Maps a supplier's specific item code and name to an internal inventory item.

supplierSku.description: The SKU or item code used by the supplier.

supplierItemName.description: The name of the item as it appears on the supplier's documents.

RequestForQuotation.title: Request for Quotation
RequestForQuotation.description: A request sent to vendors for pricing on specific items.

SupplierQuotation.title: Supplier Quotation
SupplierQuotation.description: A quotation received from a supplier in response to an RFQ.

GoodsReceiptNote.title: Goods Receipt Note
GoodsReceiptNote.description: A document to record the receipt of items into a warehouse.

InventoryAdjustment.title: Inventory Adjustment
InventoryAdjustment.description: Represents stock adjustments like opening balances, damages, etc.

BoqItem.title: Bill of Quantities Item
BoqItem.description: A single line item in a Bill of Quantities.

itemId.description: Reference to the master Item ID from the main inventory.

classification.description: The classification of the BOQ item (e.g., Concrete, Steel, Formwork).

costUnitPrice.description: The estimated unit cost for the company.

sellingUnitPrice.description: The unit price presented to the client.

margin.description: The profit margin percentage for this item.

Boq.title: Bill of Quantities
Boq.description: A standalone Bill of Quantities document, can be linked to a project or quotation.

clientId.description: Optional link to a registered client

clientName.description: Stored client name for display (can be a prospective client)

/company_settings/{settingsId}.description: Stores the main company branding and letterhead information. Expects a single document with a known ID like 'main'.

/companies/{companyId}.description: Stores company profiles for multi-company support.

/companyActivityTypes/{typeId}.description: Stores the different types of company business activities.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user login accounts, linked to employees.

/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores information about the company's clients.

/clients/{clientId}/transactions/{transa.description: Stores internal transactions/services for a specific client.
Stores the Bill of Quantities for a specific transaction.

/boqs/{boqId}.description: Stores all standalone Bill of Quantities documents.

/boqs/{boqId}/items/{itemId}.description: Stores the individual line items for a BOQ.

/transaction_assignments/{assignmentId}.description: Stores individual assignments of a transaction to different departments.

/clients/{clientId}/transactions/{transa.description: Stores the chronological history and comments for a specific transaction.

/clients/{clientId}/history/{eventId}.description: Stores the audit history and important events for a client file.

/employees/{employeeId}.description: Stores HR information about company employees.

/employees/{employeeId}/auditLogs/{logId.description: Stores the historical audit trail of changes for a specific employee.

/permissionRequests/{permissionId}.description: Stores all employee permission requests for late arrival or early departure.

/attendance/{attendanceId}.description: Stores monthly attendance sheets for employees. The ID is a composite of year-month-employeeId.

/payroll/{payslipId}.description: Stores generated monthly payslips for employees. The ID is a composite of year-month-employeeId.

/departments/{departmentId}/jobs/{jobId}.description: Stores job titles for a specific department.

/departments/{departmentId}/workStages/{.description: Stores standard work stages for a specific department.

/governorates/{governorateId}/areas/{are.description: Stores areas for a specific governorate.

/transactionTypes/{transactionTypeId}.description: Stores the types of internal client transactions, linking them to one or more departments.

/work_stages_progress/{progressId}.description: Stores logs of work stage updates from architectural visits.

/contractTemplates/{templateId}.description: Stores reusable contract templates for various transaction types.

/chartOfAccounts/{accountId}.description: Stores the company's chart of accounts.

/journalEntries/{journalEntryId}.description: Stores general journal entries created manually or by other processes.

/paymentVouchers/{voucherId}.description: Stores all payment vouchers issued by the company.

/cashReceipts/{receiptId}.description: Stores all cash receipt vouchers received by the company.

/quotations/{quotationId}.description: Stores all quotations sent to clients.

/vendors/{vendorId}.description: Stores information about suppliers and vendors.

/purchaseOrders/{poId}.description: Stores all purchase orders issued to vendors.

/residencyRenewals/{renewalId}.description: Stores financial records for employee residency renewals.

/warehouses/{warehouseId}.description: Stores all warehouses and storage locations.

/itemCategories/{categoryId}.description: Stores inventory item categories in a hierarchical structure.

/supplierItems/{supplierItemId}.description: Maps supplier-specific item codes to internal item codes.

/rfqs/{rfqId}.description: Stores all Requests for Quotation sent to vendors.

/grns/{grnId}.description: Stores all Goods Receipt Notes for incoming inventory.

/inventoryAdjustments/{adjustmentId}.description: Stores stock adjustments like opening balances, damages, etc.
